openmeter/productcatalog/plan/adapter.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL adapter implementing plan.Repository for plan lifecycle persistence (CRUD, phase management, rate card bulk creation). Primary constraint: every method body must wrap Ent calls in entutils.TransactingRepo to honor ctx-carried transactions.

patterns.name: TransactingRepo wrapping on every method
patterns.description: Every exported method body is a closure passed to entutils.TransactingRepo[T, *adapter](ctx, a, fn) so it rebinds to any tx in ctx; this is required even for reads.
patterns.example: return entutils.TransactingRepo[*plan.Plan, *adapter](ctx, a, func(ctx context.Context, a *adapter) (*plan.Plan, error) { ... })

patterns.name: Tx / WithTx / Self triad
patterns.description: adapter implements Tx (HijackTx + NewTxDriver), WithTx (NewTxClientFromRawConfig returning a fresh *adapter), and Self(); all three must exist or TransactingRepo panics.
patterns.example: func (a *adapter) WithTx(ctx context.Context, tx *entutils.TxDriver) *adapter { txClient := entdb.NewTxClientFromRawConfig(ctx, *tx.GetConfig()); return &adapter{db: txClient.Client(), logger: a.logger} }

patterns.name: Config.Validate() on construction
patterns.description: New(Config) calls config.Validate() to ensure Client and Logger are non-nil; Config satisfies models.Validator.
patterns.example: func New(config Config) (plan.Repository, error) { if err := config.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err } ... }

patterns.name: Typed eager-load var helpers
patterns.description: Reusable query modifiers (planPhaseEagerLoadRateCardsFn, rateCardEagerLoadFeaturesFn, rateCardEagerLoadTaxCodesFn, planEagerLoadActiveAddons) compose WithRatecards/WithFeatures/WithTaxCode so every query loads the full graph.

patterns.name: Soft-delete plan only; phases hard-deleted
patterns.description: DeletePlan sets DeletedAt on the plan row; phases are hard-deleted on DeletePlan and on UpdatePlan reconciliation so pre-deletion plan state stays inspectable. Queries filter plandb.DeletedAtIsNil() unless IncludeDeleted.

patterns.name: Status filtering via clock.Now() predicates
patterns.description: ListPlans maps PlanStatus enum values to EffectiveFrom/EffectiveTo Ent predicates using clock.Now().UTC() so tests can override time via clock.SetTime.
patterns.example: now := clock.Now().UTC(); predicates = append(predicates, plandb.And(plandb.EffectiveFromLTE(now), plandb.Or(plandb.EffectiveToGTE(now), plandb.EffectiveToIsNil())))

patterns.name: Bulk rate card create then re-query
patterns.description: After CreateBulk for rate cards, re-fetch the phase row with eager loads to return a fully populated struct instead of assembling in memory.

key_file_guides.role: Config struct, New(Config) constructor, and the Tx/WithTx/Self transaction rebinding plumbing.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never store a tx-scoped client permanently on the struct; WithTx must return a new *adapter with the tx-bound db.

key_file_guides.role: Core plan CRUD (ListPlans, CreatePlan, GetPlan, UpdatePlan, DeletePlan). UpdatePlan phase reconciliation is delete-all + re-create via createPhase, not an incremental diff.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Callers of UpdatePlan must supply the FULL phase set when Phases != nil; nil Phases skips phase reconciliation entirely.

key_file_guides.role: createPhase helper and rateCardBulkCreate, called by CreatePlan/UpdatePlan. Both accept a raw *entdb.PlanRateCardClient.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must always be called inside a TransactingRepo closure. rateCardBulkCreate builds []*entdb.PlanRateCardCreate but does NOT execute — the caller must CreateBulk(...).Exec(ctx).

key_file_guides.role: Bidirectional Ent↔domain conversion: FromPlanRow, fromPlanPhaseRow, fromPlanRateCardRow, asPlanRateCardRow; uses Edges.AddonsOrErr() to distinguish not-loaded from loaded-empty.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New Ent schema fields must be mapped both directions or data silently drops. TaxConfig must call productcatalog.BackfillTaxConfig after mapping the TaxCode edge.

anti_patterns: Calling a.db directly outside a TransactingRepo closure — bypasses ctx-carried transaction.
Assembling plan.Plan from in-memory state after CreateBulk instead of re-querying with eager loads.
Returning plain entdb.IsNotFound(err) without wrapping in plan.NewNotFoundError.
Soft-deleting phases on plan deletion — breaks inspection of pre-deletion plan state.
Directly editing openmeter/ent/db/ generated files instead of make generate.

decisions.decision: All methods wrap Ent access in entutils.TransactingRepo even for reads.
decisions.rationale: Ent transactions propagate via ctx; not rebinding causes a helper to fall off the caller's transaction, risking partial writes in multi-step operations.

decisions.decision: Phases are deleted and re-created wholesale on UpdatePlan when params.Phases != nil.
decisions.rationale: Correctness is simpler than incremental diffing; metadata-only updates pass nil Phases to skip reconciliation.

decisions.decision: Plan status is derived from EffectiveFrom/EffectiveTo at query time, not a stored status column.
decisions.rationale: Avoids dual-write consistency bugs and Atlas migrations when status logic changes.

code_examples.scenario: Adapter method that queries and writes inside the caller's transaction

openmeter/productcatalog/plan/httpdriver.purpose: v1 HTTP handler layer for plan lifecycle endpoints (List, Create, Update, Delete, Get, Publish, Archive, Next), translating between api.* types and plan.Service via httptransport.Handler. Primary constraint: never touch Ent or plan.Repository directly — all persistence goes through plan.Service.

patterns.name: httptransport.NewHandler(WithArgs) with typed aliases
patterns.description: Each endpoint declares XxxRequest/XxxResponse/XxxHandler type aliases, then returns a handler built from decoder, operation, encoder, and AppendOptions.

patterns.name: Namespace resolved from context in every decoder
patterns.description: h.resolveNamespace(ctx) is called in every request decoder; failure returns a 500 because the namespace is always set by upstream middleware.
patterns.example: ns, err := h.resolveNamespace(ctx); if err != nil { return Req{}, fmt.Errorf("failed to resolve namespace: %w", err) }

patterns.name: credits.Enabled guard in the decoder
patterns.description: CreatePlan/UpdatePlan decoders reject CreditOnlySettlementMode when h.credits.Enabled is false; this guard belongs in the decoder, not the operation/service.
patterns.example: if !h.credits.Enabled && req.SettlementMode == productcatalog.CreditOnlySettlementMode { return CreatePlanRequest{}, models.NewGenericValidationError(...) }

patterns.name: ValidationErrorEncoder on every handler
patterns.description: Every endpoint appends productcataloghttp.ValidationErrorEncoder(ResourceKindPlan) so plan validation issues map to proper HTTP statuses.

patterns.name: ref.ParseIDOrKey for dual ID/key routing
patterns.description: GetPlan and NextPlan use ref.ParseIDOrKey to accept either ULID IDs or string keys on one endpoint.
patterns.example: idOrKey := ref.ParseIDOrKey(params.IDOrKey); GetPlanRequest{NamespacedID: models.NamespacedID{Namespace: ns, ID: idOrKey.ID}, Key: idOrKey.Key}

key_file_guides.role: Declares Handler/PlanHandler interfaces, the handler struct, and New constructor; injects credits appconfig.CreditsConfiguration.
key_file_guides.watch_for: credits must be passed to New; omitting it silently allows CreditOnly plans when credits are disabled.

key_file_guides.role: All endpoint implementations. Create/Update decoders set IgnoreNonCriticalIssues=true; PublishPlan sets EffectiveFrom=clock.Now(); ArchivePlan sets EffectiveTo=clock.Now().
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not remove IgnoreNonCriticalIssues=true — plans may carry non-critical validation issues during create/update.

key_file_guides.role: FromPlan, FromPlanPhase, AsCreatePlanRequest, AsUpdatePlanRequest, AsPlanPhase — api↔domain conversion, delegating rate cards to productcatalog/http.FromRateCard / AsRateCards.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New plan fields must be mapped in both FromPlan and AsCreate/AsUpdate; missing fields are silently ignored at the API boundary.

key_file_guides.role: Feature-gating helpers used by the handlers to conditionally restrict behavior.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Keep gating logic in the decode phase consistent with the credits guard.

anti_patterns: Importing entdb or calling plan.Repository directly — all access goes through plan.Service.
Hardcoding namespace strings instead of h.resolveNamespace(ctx).
Omitting productcataloghttp.ValidationErrorEncoder — validation errors won't map to HTTP status codes.
Putting the credits.Enabled guard in the operation closure instead of the decoder.
Setting EffectivePeriod directly in UpdatePlan decoder — status transitions go through PublishPlan/ArchivePlan.

decisions.decision: Credits feature guard is duplicated in both CreatePlan and UpdatePlan decoders.
decisions.rationale: credits.enabled must be enforced at the HTTP boundary; the service layer does not know about deployment configuration.

decisions.decision: PublishPlan and ArchivePlan are separate explicit operations, not flags on UpdatePlan.
decisions.rationale: Prevents callers manipulating plan status via UpdatePlan; EffectivePeriod is zeroed in UpdatePlan so transitions are gated through explicit publish/archive paths.

code_examples.scenario: Adding a plan endpoint with the three-alias + handler pattern

openmeter/productcatalog/plan/service.purpose: Business-logic service implementing plan.Service: validates inputs, resolves feature/taxcode cross-references, enforces status-based mutation guards, delegates persistence to plan.Repository, and publishes domain events. Primary constraint: all mutations wrap adapter calls and event publishing inside transaction.Run.

patterns.name: transaction.Run wrapping for all mutations
patterns.description: Create, Update, Delete, Publish, Archive, Next wrap adapter calls and publisher.Publish inside transaction.Run(ctx, s.adapter, fn) for atomicity.

patterns.name: resolveFeatures + resolveTaxCodes before adapter write
patterns.description: Before CreatePlan/UpdatePlan persists, resolveFeatures populates FeatureKey↔FeatureID and resolveTaxCodes populates TaxCodeID; missing features become GenericValidationError.
patterns.example: if err = s.resolveFeatures(ctx, params.Namespace, &phase.RateCards); err != nil { if models.IsGenericNotFoundError(err) { err = models.NewGenericValidationError(err) }; return nil, err }

patterns.name: Event publishing inside the transaction closure
patterns.description: After a successful adapter mutation, the method publishes plan.NewPlanXxxEvent inside the closure so a publish failure rolls back the DB write.
patterns.example: if err := s.publisher.Publish(ctx, plan.NewPlanCreateEvent(ctx, p)); err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to publish plan created event: %w", err) }

patterns.name: Status guard before mutations
patterns.description: UpdatePlan/DeletePlan/PublishPlan/ArchivePlan check allowed statuses via lo.Contains before delegating; violations return GenericValidationError.
patterns.example: if !lo.Contains([]productcatalog.PlanStatus{productcatalog.PlanStatusDraft, productcatalog.PlanStatusScheduled}, p.Status()) { return nil, models.NewGenericValidationError(...) }

patterns.name: Config-based constructor with non-nil validation
patterns.description: New(Config) validates Adapter, Feature, TaxCode, Logger, Publisher are non-nil; var _ plan.Service = (*service)(nil) enforces interface satisfaction.
patterns.example: func New(config Config) (plan.Service, error) { if err := config.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err }; return service{...}, nil }

patterns.name: Version auto-increment in CreatePlan
patterns.description: CreatePlan queries existing versions for the plan key and sets params.Version = max + 1; callers must not pass a version.

key_file_guides.role: Config struct, New constructor, service struct with private dependency fields (adapter, feature, taxCode, logger, publisher).
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a dependency requires updating Config validation, Config struct, and service struct together.

key_file_guides.role: All plan.Service methods plus resolveFeatures/resolveTaxCodes helpers.
key_file_guides.watch_for: EffectivePeriod is explicitly zeroed in UpdatePlan to prevent status manipulation. Default settlement mode CreditThenInvoice is applied here when not provided.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests using pctestutils.NewTestEnv, driving behavior through env.Plan (service), not env.PlanRepository (adapter).
key_file_guides.watch_for: Existing tests use context.Background(); new tests should prefer t.Context() per project convention.

anti_patterns: Calling s.adapter directly for mutations without transaction.Run — breaks atomicity with event publishing.
Allowing EffectivePeriod to be set via UpdatePlan — it is explicitly zeroed.
Skipping resolveFeatures before CreatePlan/UpdatePlan — rate cards store incomplete feature cross-references.
Publishing events outside the transaction closure — both DB write and publish must be inside transaction.Run.
Returning entdb/adapter-level errors directly instead of domain errors (GenericNotFoundError, GenericValidationError).

decisions.decision: Feature and TaxCode resolution lives in the service, not the adapter.
decisions.rationale: Adapter handles only persistence; cross-entity lookups are orchestration concerns.

decisions.decision: Version is auto-incremented from existing versions; callers cannot set it.
decisions.rationale: Prevents version gaps and ensures monotonically increasing versions per plan key under concurrent creates.

decisions.decision: Default settlement mode CreditThenInvoice is applied in the service, not the HTTP handler.
decisions.rationale: Keeps the default a domain invariant so non-HTTP callers get the same default.

code_examples.scenario: A mutating service method that calls the adapter and publishes an event
